result.description: pass = Codex independently drove the live app through the slice acceptance with no defect or console error. fail = a real defect/console error was observed.

summary.description: Terse account of what was exercised and the outcome.

steps.description: The concrete playwright-cli interactions performed (open/snapshot/click/fill/assert), in order.

failures.description: Observed defects. Empty when result is pass.
